expectations.text: Output contains a fenced code block with a structured/formatted prompt before any execution content
expectations.evidence: Lines 8-21 contain a fenced code block with the structured prompt including role persona, task, context, constraints, and output format. This appears before the Phase 2 email draft starting at line 29.

expectations.text: There is a clear visual separation between the formatted prompt display and the execution phase
expectations.evidence: '## Phase 1: Formatted Prompt' at line 3, code block at lines 8-21, horizontal rule at line 27, '## Phase 2: Execution' at line 29.

expectations.text: Administrative/Email role is selected (task is drafting an email)
expectations.evidence: Line 6: '**Role:** Administrative & Email (triggered by: email, meeting, schedule)'. The role persona text is included in the code block at line 9.

expectations.text: Depth is correctly calibrated to Light (simple email draft)
expectations.evidence: Line 5: '**Depth:** Light (routine email, no escalation signals)'

expectations.text: After showing the formatted prompt, Claude actually drafts the email
expectations.evidence: Phase 2 (lines 29-38) contains a complete email draft with subject line, greeting, body proposing Tuesday/Wednesday afternoon, and sign-off from Adrien.

eval_feedback.overall: All assertions passed with genuine evidence. The two-phase structure is clearly visible.
